caption: A promotional video for TFNN.com, titled "EDUCATING INVESTORS," features a layout designed for a streaming service. The top section contains a navigation bar with links for "HOME," "TIGER TV," "NEWSLETTERS," "SERVICES," "ABOUT," and "ADVERTISING," alongside an "Account" login. Centered text invites viewers to "Welcome to Tiger TV - Watch Live" and to "Tune in daily to watch & interact with our hosts as they take you through a myriad of topics: investments, trading, commodities, etc...". Banners from Ameritrade appear, urging viewers to "Discover the value of becoming a smarter trader." Below these elements, a segment titled "The Tiger Technicians Hour | June 8th, 2022" features a man named Basil Chapman. He is wearing a dark suit jacket and a white shirt. In the bottom right corner, "NG JRS" is visible. Across the frames, the scene remains static with no visible movement or changes in text or positioning.
